description: Standard: tech industry source making claims about AI safety

input.source_role: Chief Ethics Officer at Meridian AI, a mid-size AI company
claims: Current AI safety testing protocols are inadequate and miss 30% of harmful outputs
Our proprietary testing framework catches risks that industry-standard benchmarks do not
input.story_context: Feature on whether AI companies can be trusted to self-regulate safety

description: Minimal: single claim from a local official

claims: The rezoning will not displace current residents
input.story_context: News story on a controversial rezoning proposal

description: European: EU policy expert on agricultural subsidies

input.source_role: Chair of Agricultural Economics at Utrecht University and former adviser to the European Commission's DG AGRI
claims: The Common Agricultural Policy reform will reduce small farmer income by 18% in southern member states
Large agribusiness groups captured the reform process through targeted lobbying in Brussels
input.story_context: Investigative feature on CAP reform winners and losers for a European policy magazine
